title: Bridge Paper: Associations between Nature Exposure and Health: A Review of the Evidence.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Nature connectedness — biophilia hypothesis, nature neuroscience, environmental neuroscience.
**Phase context:** nature connectedness, biophilia, nature neuroscience, environmental neuroscience, nature exposure

Paper: Associations between Nature Exposure and Health: A Review of the Evidence.
DOI: 10.3390/ijerph18094790
Abstract: There is extensive empirical literature on the association between exposure to nature and health. In this narrative review, we discuss the strength of evidence from recent (i.e., the last decade) experimental and observational studies on nature exposure and health, highlighting research on children and youth where possible. We found evidence for associations between nature exposure and improved cognitive function, brain activity, blood pressure, mental health, physical activity, and sleep. Resul
